article_meta.title: Washington DC Trump celebrates US' long history giving foreign enemies 'hell' at massive military parade The military pa

reasoning: Mixed quality: one clear attribution violation by flagging quoted headline language, two questionable/incorrect flags, some missed author-level bias, and several misapplied bias-type labels. Not catastrophic but notably flawed.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: Item 1 flags the quoted phrase "giving foreign enemies 'hell'" in the headline, violating the rule against using quoted source language as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Item 3 wrongly claims omission of attribution where the article attributes the 'biggest' claim to the administration and then quotes named officials; Item 1 is also problematic due to relying on quoted text.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed clear author-prose bias such as 'The patriotic event...' (subjective framing) and 'incredibly tight' security (subjective intensifier).
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labels are off for multiple items: Item 3 mislabels as Omission of Source Attribution; Item 4 uses Story Choice & Placement where Slant/Negativity Bias or Word Choice would fit better. Others are reasonable.
